reasoning: The current confirmed direct death toll, according to both the Gaza Health Ministry and independent peer-reviewed surveys (e.g., Lancet Global Health, Feb 2026), is around 71,000 - 75,000 as of early 2026. A ceasefire has been in place since October 2025, drastically reducing the casualty rate (only a few hundred added over months). A widespread 2024 extrapolation of up to 186,000 deaths (which assumed a 4:1 indirect-to-direct ratio) was contradicted by the 2026 Lancet study, which found only about 8,200 indirect deaths. Additionally, rumors of "377,000 missing" were debunked as a typo/misinterpretation of IDF zone population estimates. While the Manifold market prediction is surprisingly high at 0.67 (possibly due to stale positions or holdouts hoping for large uncounted indirect deaths), the hard scientific and official consensus points to a figure comfortably below 100,000. I am going below the market but maintaining some uncertainty in case the market creator accepts a broader indirect death estimate.
